feat.name: Sympathetic Strike
feat.text: You collect your patron’s magic into one of your witch armaments, causing them to shine with runes, light, or another signifier of your patron. Make an unarmed Strike with one with your witch’s armaments. If you hit, you establish a sympathetic link with the target, making it easier for your patron to affect them. Until the beginning of your next turn, the target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to its saves against your hexes, or a –2 penalty if the triggering Strike was a critical hit.

traits.name: Witch
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the witch class.
